title: Constellations
body:
# Constellations

Denver four-piece formed in 2004 — "frantic and manic brand of futuristic rock and pop music," variously described by press as innovative, infectious, chaotic, unsettling. The post-punk/dance/experimental band went quiet, then announced a return in 2010 as a "nationwide collective" working to finish unreleased songs.

## Connection to Colin

Track 12 of REMIX10: **"CONSTELLATIONS-SAVAGE ORB (scary dipper mix)"** — Colin's "scary dipper mix" of "Savage Orb." The 2010 timing matches Constellations' announced reactivation.

## Source

- [Constellations return as a "nationwide collective" — Westword (2010)](https://www.westword.com/music/constellations-return-as-a-nationwide-collective-with-new-music-5699550)
